what_it_does: Records metadata for an image attachment that links the design-source channel to image asset p-16.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, with no body content
standouts: References a recent-pitches image asset via an image:// URI
Serves as a typed, dated ledger entry with no body content
conventions: id prefixed with att- and paired with channel and target fields
image:// URI scheme for asset targets
concerns: Target URI cannot be resolved or validated from this file alone
No caption, alt text, uploader, or file-size metadata
Attachment carries only a timestamp and type
notes: Sparse metadata stub that ties the design-source channel to image asset p-16.
questions: What does pitch image p-16 depict?
Who added the attachment and why?
Is the image:// URI still valid and accessible?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: the file records an image attachment reference as intended.
intention_signals: It appears to create a durable, queryable link between a channel discussion and a specific image asset.
contribution: Provides a dated, typed reference that maps a channel to an external image asset, supporting attachment indexing and audit trails.
summary_for_embedding: Attachment metadata stub att-6e6e9fc4 records an images-type link from the design-source channel to image asset p-16 with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To log that an image asset was attached to the design-source channel for a recent pitch.
